selection_reason: Retained as a high-h2 non-BCAA amino-acid marker that broadens the amino-acid module beyond BCAA and aromatic signals.
Retained as a lower-redundancy amino-acid marker that may capture unique non-BCAA variation during EFA/ESEM.
Retained as a core BCAA representative with strong h2 and slightly less extreme redundancy than isoleucine.
Retained as an aromatic amino-acid core marker and likely anchor for any aromatic/BCAA separation.
Retained as the complementary aromatic amino-acid marker and a possible bridge to the broader amino-acid factor.
Retained as a core BCAA representative with very high h2 Z and strong signal across the amino-acid cluster.
Retained as a low-redundancy central-carbon marker that may contribute unique structure despite modest pairwise correlations.
Retained as the canonical glycemic marker for the energy-metabolism block.
Retained as a glycolytic marker and plausible bridge to inflammatory or fasting-related biology.
Retained as a ketone/fasting-related marker with distinctive negative correlation to lactate and GlycA.
Retained as a canonical ketone marker and likely core anchor for any ketone-body factor.
Retained as a canonical beta-hydroxybutyrate marker with cleaner complementarity to acetate and acetoacetate than acetone.
Retained as a fluid-balance / serum abundance sentinel needed to test whether renal-systemic variation forms a bridge factor.
Retained as a renal-handling sentinel with high h2 and strong interpretability for a nonlipid bridge factor.
Retained as the sole inflammation trait because it may bridge amino-acid, glucose, and renal-systemic variation.
Dropped at compact stage because the amino-acid block is already well covered and alanine is less specific than the retained BCAA, aromatic, and glutamine/histidine representatives.
Dropped at compact stage because it is nearly redundant with both leucine and valine (|rg| > 0.95) and was not needed once the BCAA cluster remained represented by Leu and Val.
Dropped at compact stage because the ketone block is already represented by acetate, acetoacetate, and beta-hydroxybutyrate, while acetone is the most dispensable support marker.
